item.title: When is the next results date for Housing Development & Infrastructure Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Housing Development & Infrastructure Ltd is 13 March 2026. Time: Mar 06 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Fractal Industri?
item.description: Fractal Industri will announce its results on 10 March 2026. Time: Mar 06 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: What is the bonus history of Cupid?
item.description: Cupid's bonus history includes a 4:1 bonus announced for March 9, 2026, a 1:1 bonus issued on April 4, 2024, and a 1:5 bonus from October 12, 2018. These events demonstrate Cupid's commitment to rewarding shareholders with bonus shares. Time: Mar 06 2026 11:00 PM IST

item.title: What is the bonus history of Kapston Services?
item.description: Kapston Services has a history of issuing bonuses to shareholders, with the latest being a 1:2 bonus announced for March 6, 2026, and a previous 1:6 bonus issued on January 28, 2020. Time: Mar 06 2026 11:00 PM IST

item.title: Aurum Proptech Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Aurum Proptech Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term outlook. Time: Mar 06 2026 06:55 PM IST

item.title: Repco Home Finance Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Repco Home Finance Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s short- to medium-term momentum, raising concerns about its near-term price trajectory amid already subdued market sentiment. Time: Mar 06 2026 06:55 PM IST

item.title: Indo Thai Securities Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Indo Thai Securities Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: Mar 06 2026 06:55 PM IST

item.title: Barak Valley Cements Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Barak Valley Cements Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Cement & Cement Products sector, has recently formed a Death Cross—a technical pattern where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average—indicating a potential shift towards a sustained bearish trend and signalling deteriorating momentum for the stock. Time: Mar 06 2026 06:55 PM IST

item.title: Reliance Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Reliance Industries Ltd (Stock ID: 605152) has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum. Investors and market watchers should carefully analyse the implications of this event amid the company’s current financial and market performance. Time: Mar 06 2026 06:55 PM IST

item.title: The Peria Karamalai Tea & Produce Company Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: The Peria Karamalai Tea & Produce Company Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness in the FMCG sector player’s price trajectory. Time: Mar 06 2026 06:55 PM IST

item.title: Welspun Living Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Welspun Living Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term outlook within the Garments & Apparels sector. Time: Mar 06 2026 06:55 PM IST

item.description: Excel Realty N Infra Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. item.title: Prerna Infrabuild Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Prerna Infrabuild Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Realty sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raises concerns about sustained bearish momentum in the near to medium term. Time: Mar 06 2026 06:55 PM IST

item.title: Universus Photo Imagings Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Universus Photo Imagings Ltd has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses above the 200-day moving average. This development suggests a potential bullish breakout and a shift in long-term momentum for the FMCG company, which has already demonstrated strong relative performance against the Sensex over the past year. Time: Mar 06 2026 06:55 PM IST

item.title: Medico Intercontinental Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Indicating Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Medico Intercontinental Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Trading & Distributors sector, has recently formed a Golden Cross—a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses above the 200-DMA. This development often signals a potential bullish breakout, suggesting a shift in long-term momentum and a possible trend reversal for the stock. Time: Mar 06 2026 06:55 PM IST

item.title: True Green Bio Energy Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: True Green Bio Energy Ltd has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) has crossed above the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential bullish breakout and a long-term momentum shift for the stock, suggesting a favourable trend reversal for investors in the Garments & Apparels sector. Time: Mar 06 2026 06:55 PM IST
